people.name: End User
people.description: Users interacting with Pocketpaw through various messaging platforms (Discord, Slack, Telegram) to access AI-powered features and services

people.name: Discord User
people.description: Users accessing Pocketpaw through Discord servers and direct messages for AI-assisted conversations and commands

people.name: Slack User
people.description: Team members using Pocketpaw integrated within Slack workspaces for collaborative AI-powered assistance

people.name: Telegram User
people.description: Users interacting with Pocketpaw through Telegram bot for on-the-go AI assistance and conversations

people.name: System Administrator
people.description: Administrator responsible for managing Pocketpaw deployment, monitoring system health, and configuring external AI service integrations

containers.name: Pocketpaw Core
containers.description: Core Python/FastAPI backend providing agent orchestration, LLM integration, knowledge management, security, and extensible adapters for multiple platforms including Discord, Slack, Telegram, and OpenAI.

components.name: API Layer
components.description: REST API endpoints and HTTP routing for external and internal requests. Handles versioning and endpoint management.

components.name: Agent Orchestration
components.description: Manages AI agent creation, configuration, lifecycle, and execution. Coordinates agent-to-agent communication and markdown-based agent definitions.

components.name: LLM Integration
components.description: Interfaces with language models including Anthropic and OpenAI. Manages model selection, prompting, and response handling.

components.name: Knowledge Management
components.description: Manages knowledge bases, vector database operations, and semantic search capabilities for agent context and memory.

components.name: Memory & State
components.description: Handles conversation history, agent state persistence, and context management across sessions.

components.name: Platform Adapters
components.description: Integrates with Discord, Slack, Telegram, and other messaging platforms. Transforms platform-specific formats to unified internal protocols.

components.name: Tools & Skills
components.description: Extensible tool system enabling agents to execute actions. Includes built-in tools, custom skill definitions, and integration kits.

components.name: Model Context Protocol
components.description: Implements MCP server and client for standardized tool and resource integration with language models.

components.name: Security & Authentication
components.description: Handles OAuth2 authentication, authorization, encryption, and secure credential management across all components.

components.name: Audit & Compliance
components.description: Tracks system events, user actions, and compliance logging for security and regulatory requirements.

components.name: Automation Engine
components.description: Defines and executes automated workflows, triggers, and scheduled tasks for agent-driven operations.

components.name: Integrations
components.description: Third-party service connectors and external system bridges for extended functionality and data exchange.

components.name: Data Connectors
components.description: Manages connections to databases, APIs, and data sources used by agents and tools.

components.name: Service Providers
components.description: Abstracts service implementations including LLM providers, vector database providers, and storage backends.

components.name: Background Daemon
components.description: Long-running background processes for event processing, cleanup, and asynchronous task execution.

components.name: Event Bus
components.description: Asynchronous message bus for inter-component communication and event-driven architecture.

components.name: Health & Monitoring
components.description: System health checks, status reporting, and diagnostic endpoints for operational monitoring.

components.name: Bootstrap & Initialization
components.description: Application startup, configuration loading, dependency injection, and system initialization.

components.name: Command Line Interface
components.description: CLI tools for system administration, testing, deployment, and manual operations.

components.name: Data Schemas
components.description: Request/response validation schemas, data models, and serialization definitions using Pydantic.

components.name: Constants & Configuration
components.description: Centralized application constants, configuration values, and environment-based settings.

components.name: Browser Automation
components.description: Web automation and browser control capabilities for agents to interact with web applications.

components.name: Deep Work Engine
components.description: Complex task decomposition and multi-step reasoning for sophisticated agent workflows.

components.name: Validation Checks
components.description: Pre and post-execution validation, sanity checks, and error detection throughout the system.

components.name: Agent Personality & Soul
components.description: Manages agent personality traits, behavioral patterns, and character definitions.

components.name: Enterprise Edition
components.description: Enterprise-specific features, advanced capabilities, and specialized functionality.

components.name: Feature Flags
components.description: Feature toggle management and experimental feature control.

components.name: JavaScript Utilities
components.description: JavaScript-based utilities and client-side functionality.

components.name: Decision Graph
components.description: Materializes decision chains from journal events into queryable Decisions. Provides Python API for audit, trace, and explainability.

systems.name: Anthropic API
systems.description: Claude AI service providing large language model capabilities for natural language processing and intelligent conversation features in Pocketpaw

systems.name: Discord API
systems.description: Discord messaging platform API enabling Pocketpaw to integrate with Discord servers and provide bot functionality for Discord users

systems.name: OpenAI API
systems.description: GPT-based AI service providing alternative language model capabilities for text generation and conversation features in Pocketpaw

systems.name: Slack API
systems.description: Slack workplace messaging platform API enabling Pocketpaw integration with Slack workspaces for team-based AI assistance

systems.name: Telegram Bot API
systems.description: Telegram messaging platform API enabling Pocketpaw to operate as a Telegram bot for direct user interactions and conversations

relationships.description: subscribes to journal events to fold decisions
is the queryable audit log — decisions, traces, lineage
